title: Magic Bundle
description: A variant of bundles found in rare structures that grants or robs the user of much more that they asked for...
body: [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=black)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/magic-bundle) [![Organization](https://img.shields.io/badge/Organization-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=black)](https://modrinth.com/organization/cre8to-team) [![Feedback](https://img.shields.io/badge/feedback%20form%20(no%20login)-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=googleforms&color=indigo)](https://forms.gle/fkgMp6YroGjwH8Nr5) [![Donate@CupOfCoffee](https://img.shields.io/badge/donate%20a%20cup%20of%20coffee-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=patreon&color=black)](https://patreon.com/cre8to) --- ## 📗 DESCRIPTION Magic Bundle is a Minecraft mod that introduces a variant of bundles found in rare structures, offering unpredictable outcomes. The Magic Bundle can randomly explode or double its contents, providing an exciting gamble. It can be found in Woodland Mansions. The Lucky Bundle, found in ocean ruins, requires at least one item or a ghast tear for activation, bringing luck to your adventures. It adds a fun, unpredictable element to the game’s storage and loot systems. ## ✨ KEY FEATURES > Offers new **Bundle** items with unique characteristics. > Two variants of Bundle found in rare stuctures. > Robs or grants the player rare items. --- **CHECKOUT GALLERY FOR RECIPES!** [![Banner](https://github.com/Creatomat/creatomat.github.io/blob/main/cre8to_1.png?raw=true)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2788)
